---
description: "load.py source structure, CLI, database schema, and test structure."
name: load_reference
applyTo: "make_docs/src/flutterdocs/load/**,make_docs/tests/load/**"
---

# load.py Reference

## Purpose

`load.py` (registered as the `load` script in `pyproject.toml`) reads the markdown output produced by `convert.py` and loads it into a sqlite3 database. It uses `PathBuilder` and `list_entity_names()` exclusively for path construction — never manual path building.

## CLI Invocation

`-s` and `-S` are mutually exclusive; exactly one is required.

```
load -d <doc_dir> (-s <section> | -S <section_list_file>) -o <db_file> [-v]
```

- `-d` / `--documents`: Root markdown output directory produced by `convert.py`.
- `-s` / `--section`: Single documentation section name (e.g., `material`).
- `-S` / `--section-list`: Path to a text file of section names, one per line; blank lines and `#` comments are ignored.
- `-o` / `--output`: Path to the sqlite3 database file to create or add to.
- `-v` / `--verbose`: Enable verbose logging.

## Database Schema

Tables: `identifier`, `entity_type`, `member_type`, `library`, `entity`, `member`. The full DDL is embedded in `db.py` as `SCHEMA_DDL` and applied once on `open_or_create_db()`.

## Shared Code

All shared code lives in `make_docs/src/flutterdocs/_shared/`:

- `constants.py`: `CategoryType` (StrEnum), `MemberType` (StrEnum), `ALL_CATEGORIES`, `ALL_MEMBERS`.
- `paths.py`: `PathBuilder`, `ensure_dir_exists()`, `list_entity_names()`, `read_section_list()`.
- `logging.py`: `configure_logging()`, `get_progress_logger()`, `get_notification_logger()`, `log_processing_error()`.

Key `PathBuilder` usage (omit `doc_dir`; use `output_dir` for `doc_dir`):
- `builder.get_library_file()` → section library markdown file.
- `builder.get_entity_file()` → root entity markdown file.
- `builder.get_snippets_dir()` → snippets directory; glob `*.md` for snippet files.
- `builder.get_constructors_dir()`, `builder.get_native_methods_dir()`, etc. → member subdirectories; glob `*.md` to enumerate members.

## Source Structure

```
make_docs/src/flutterdocs/
  _shared/
    constants.py       # CategoryType, MemberType, ALL_CATEGORIES, ALL_MEMBERS
    paths.py           # PathBuilder, ensure_dir_exists, list_entity_names, read_section_list
    logging.py         # Logging helpers
  load/
    __main__.py        # Entry point (calls cli.main)
    cli.py             # Argument parsing, validation, orchestration loop
    db.py              # open_or_create_db(), upsert_library/entity/member, lookup helpers
    loader.py          # load_entity(), collect_members(), collect_snippets()
```

## Test Structure

```
tests/
  conftest.py          # Top-level: output_dir fixture (tmp_path)
  load/
    conftest.py        # SAMPLES_DIR, run_load(), run_load_list(),
                       # db_path fixture, loaded_material_db fixture
    unit/              # Pure unit tests (no filesystem, no subprocess)
    integration/       # End-to-end tests using sample markdown in samples/
      samples/         # Markdown files generated by running convert against
                       # tests/convert/integration/samples/; regenerate if
                       # convert.py output format changes
        api/
          <section>/
```
